items.title: Visualize coding agents in 3D
items.oneliner: Local app replays coding-agent sessions as a 3D codebase map so you can inspect file paths, edits, and dead ends.

items.title: Run a lightweight coding agent
items.oneliner: Early open coding agent you can install and test now for AI-assisted edits inside existing developer workflows.

items.title: Use Ghostty inside Emacs
items.oneliner: Emacs terminal module powered by libghostty with Kitty graphics, shell integration, bookmarks, and remote sessions via TRAMP.

items.title: Generate native Python protobufs
items.oneliner: New Python Protobuf implementation supports proto2 and proto3, readable generated code, and optional Rust acceleration for speed.

items.title: Diff text with a native GUI
items.oneliner: Lightweight C++ diff viewer supports inner diffs, directory comparisons, and local git integration without Electron overhead.

items.title: Automate actions from log patterns
items.oneliner: Daemon watches program output for repeated patterns and triggers actions automatically, useful for ops alerts and self-healing scripts.

items.title: Query Clojure code as graphs
items.oneliner: Small Clojure library models business logic as queryable graphs with resolvers, caching, and simpler ergonomics than Pathom.

items.title: Pipe utility data into Home Assistant
items.oneliner: Hands-on Python walkthrough pulls Contact Energy gas readings into Home Assistant for daily usage tracking and custom automations.

items.title: Reverse engineer an app to web
items.oneliner: Practical teardown shows how to inspect Android network traffic and rebuild an app's core flow as a simple webpage.

items.title: Study a real SQLi to RCE chain
items.oneliner: Detailed exploit writeup walks through finding SQL injection in a JSON API and chaining it into remote code execution.
